signals.raw:
Duke Rodriguez's Ballot Status Secured After NM Supreme Court Ruling | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **New Mexico Supreme Court unanimously ruled** that Republican gubernatorial candidate Duke Rodriguez can appear on the June primary ballot[1]. This resolved a legal challenge to his candidacy and confirms his participation in the Republican primary alongside Greg Hall and Doug Turner[1].
